project_type: Full-stack care home management app (CareVista) - React frontend + Express/TypeScript backend
build_system: Vite for frontend, tsc for backend, npm package manager
test_framework: No formal test framework found - manual verification via build
build_command: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build
test_command: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run build in frontend (tsc + vite). 2. Run npm run build in backend (tsc). Both must succeed.
setup_instructions: cd frontend && npm install; cd backend && npm install
environment_constraints: Open internet available for npm packages. No database or Docker daemon running - validation is AST/compile only.
contribution_requirements: Commit locally. Do not push. Use inline styles matching existing pattern (no CSS framework). Follow existing React Query hook patterns in frontend/src/hooks/index.ts.
key_patterns: Frontend: Inline styles, React Query hooks in hooks/index.ts, Zustand auth store, api.ts service layer, pages in pages/ with dashboards in pages/dashboards/. Backend: Express controllers in controllers/, routes in routes/index.ts, raw SQL via pg query() helper, seed data in utils/seed.ts. Residents have a 'care_needs_summary' TEXT field that includes mobility info as free text. The mobility_notes field exists in TypeScript types but not in the SQL schema - mobility data is in the care_needs_summary.
directory_structure: Root: docker-compose.yml, frontend/, backend/. Frontend: src/App.tsx (routing), src/pages/ (page components), src/pages/dashboards/ (role dashboards), src/components/ (reusable widgets), src/hooks/index.ts (all hooks), src/services/api.ts (axios client), src/types/index.ts (types), src/store/auth.store.ts (Zustand). Backend: src/index.ts (entry), src/routes/index.ts (all routes), src/controllers/ (handlers), src/models/db.ts (pg pool), src/utils/seed.ts (demo data), migrations/ (SQL schema).
